flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Simpson University rose 25% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.7k → $13.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Simpson University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (48.3% → 40.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Simpson University rose 13% between 2007 and 2010 ($18.6k → $21.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Simpson University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.9k → $39.7k).
